title: Log Minecraft Startup
description: Logs when the Minecraft prelaunch starts and when Minecraft initializes (Minecraft window appears).
body:
# Log Minecraft Startup

Mod specifically made for custom launchers so the launcher is aware when the minecraft window becomes visible. Do what you want with the output of this mod.

Output:
- Pre-Launch : "Minecraft Pre-launching - LOGMCPRELAUNCH"
- Initialize : "Minecraft Initializing - LOGMCINIT"

Purpose:
- Use a string.Contains() method on the log output to detect if the window appears.
